title: Heavy-tailed bandit: optimal exploration bonus
setting: What is the minimax-optimal exploration bonus when arm distributions have bounded (1+epsilon)-th moments but may not be sub-Gaussian? Can we achieve O(T^{eps/(1+eps)}) regret?
known_results: Catoni's M-estimator for heavy-tailed mean estimation
Median-of-means achieves subgaussian rates with bounded variance
Standard UCB fails without sub-Gaussian assumption

title: Infinite-arm bandit: minimax rate with Gaussian priors
setting: Derive the minimax regret rate for bandit problems where arm means are drawn i.i.d. from N(0,1) and the number of arms K grows with T. Is the rate T^{2/3} or something tighter?
known_results: Berry (1994): infinite-arm bandit studied with geometric prior
Gaussian process bandit bounds (Srinivas et al. 2010)
Carpentier & Valko (2015): T^{1-1/(1+beta)} for beta-regular priors

title: Batched bandit: information loss from delayed feedback
setting: In the batched bandit problem with M batches, how does the regret scale with M? Is the optimal rate achievable with O(log log T) batches?
known_results: Full adaptive UCB1 achieves O(sqrt(KT log T))
Gao et al. (2019): O(log log T) batches suffice for near-optimal regret
